go-tutorial-advanced.description: Advanced MCP server with tools (search, filter, stats), resources (users, products, system_info), and prompts

go-tutorial-basic.description: Basic MCP server with simple tools (calculator, echo, timestamp, weather)

go-tutorial-restaurant.description: Restaurant booking MCP server with Voice + MCP integration pattern - tools for search/book/reviews, calendar integration, resources for user preferences/history, and orchestrated booking workflow prompt
